get.description: This endpoint allows you to retrieve all the mailboxes for a given mail hosting.

parameters.name: with

code.description: The error code returned, the description add details relative to this code.object_not_found: Triggered when the asked entity is not accessible.

post.description: Creates a new mailbox in the mail hosting.

parameters.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the mail hosting to request.
parameters.name: mail_hosting_id

parameters.description: *Optional* : Allows loading additional data about a resource, which may include related resources.
parameters.name: with

target.title: target
target.description: Specifies who has access to the mailbox during its creation.current_user: Only the current user has access to the mailbox.ksuite_user: All users who are part of the kSuite product can access the mailbox.other_user: All invited users can have access to the mailbox.

code.description: Error code

description.example: Catchall not allow for starter

get.description: Returns a variety of information about a single a Mailbox specified by the requested unique identifier.

parameters.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the mail hosting to request.
parameters.name: mail_hosting_id

parameters.description: The username (that is the part before the @) of the email address you want to request.
parameters.name: mailbox_name

parameters.description: *Optional* : Allows loading additional data about a resource, which may include related resources.
parameters.name: with

schema.title: unit
schema.description: Specifies the storage unit for the mailbox.b: Return the unit size in Bytes.mb: Return the unit size in Megabytes.kb: Return the unit size in Kilobytes.

has_dont_deliver.title: has_dont_deliver
has_dont_deliver.description: Indicates if the mailbox should delete emails locally after forwarding them

has_forward_spam.title: has_forward_spam
has_forward_spam.description: Indicates if the mailbox should forward mail that are considered to be spam

is_enabled.title: is_enabled
is_enabled.description: Indicates if the redirection is enabled on the mailbox.\n Warning: setting it to false drop all the existing adresses

redirect_addresses.title: redirect_addresses
redirect_addresses.description: List of the redirection addresses where the mail are redirected in the mailbox, the maximum is set to 1 if you have a starter pack

description.example: Too much redirections
